name: Manifest
tagline: Chinatown coffee shop by day, cocktail bar by night — a creative hub with gallery vibes and excellent espresso.
parking: Street parking; paid lots on Maunakea St
talkStory: By day, Manifest is a serene Chinatown coffee shop with excellent espresso and a quiet, artistic atmosphere. By night, it transforms into a cocktail bar with local DJs and a creative crowd. The space is filled with provocative art and has a lofty, gallery-like feel. Locals love the duality — come for coffee and work in the afternoon, return for cocktails and socializing at night. Friday and Saturday nights are the most lively.
